```{=html}
<!-- PAGE HEADER -->
<div class="page-header">
  <h1>Contact Us</h1>
</div>

<div class="container">
  <p style="font-size:1.05rem; margin-top:1rem;">
    We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have questions about our programs, want to volunteer, or just want to share your feedback, please fill out the form below.
  </p>
  <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mldnwdod" method="POST">
    <label for="name">Your Name</label>
    <input type="text" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your Name" required>
    <label for="email">Your Email</label>
    <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="Your Email" required>
    <label for="message">Your Message</label>
    <textarea id="message" name="message" placeholder="Your Message" rows="5" required></textarea>
    <button type="submit" class="btn">Send Message</button>
  </form>
  <p style="margin-top:1.5rem; color:#555;">
    If you experience any issues with the form, please email us directly at
    <a href="mailto:help@culturalhealthconnect.org">help@culturalhealthconnect.org</a>.
  </p>
</div>

<footer>
  © 2025 Cultural Health Connect
</footer>
```
